entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00020) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 6748 REVISED: DIRECT LOAN DISCHARGE FORM COLLECTION, CR 6904 REVISED - USDS SERVICER IDR REGULATION CHANGES, CR 6916 LOAN DISCHARGE APPLICATION: FORGERY EXP 2026, AND UPDATE IPV6 FSA CYBERSECUTIRY REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00021) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE REQUIREMENTS OF CR 6969 MAILING AND BILLING STATEMENT CHANGES, TO CLARIFY AT RISK FOR ALLOCATIONS AND FOR INCENTIVES, AND TO REVISE CR 6681 TO DIRECT THE BORROWER TO STUDENTAID.GOV FOR IDR ELIGIBILITY INFORMATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00022) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 7009 - USDS - PROXY PAYMENT UPDATE, UPDATE THE ADDRESS VALIDATION REQUIREMENTS RELATED TO BORROWER DEFENSE PROCESSING SWEET REFUNDS, AND MAKE AN ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION TO A SPELLING ERROR.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR6927 - FY24 - FINANCIAL AUDIT HANDOUTS - NON - DEFAULTED LOANS AND CR6979 - USDS - SERVICER REPORTING REVISIONS. entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00029) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 7125 - USDS SERVICER INFORMATION PORTAL INTEGRATION WITH AIMS MFA - NELNET. NELNET ADDED FOUR(4) NEW URLS THAT WILL NEED TO BE INTEGRATED WITH THE AIMS SYSTEM. THIS IS A CONTINUATION OF CR 6889.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION
